title: satureja subspicata f. liburnica
intro: Satureja subspicata f. liburnica, also known as mountain savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of mountain savory include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of colds and flu, and boost the immune system. Mountain savory can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional medicine and culinary applications.
